error_signature: corrupt vCard output from base64 conversion
title: Corrupt vCard output due to incorrect base64 conversion
symptom: The generated vCard file appears empty or corrupt when opened, indicating that the data format is incorrect.
applies_when: Using base64 encoding for file content
not_this_if: vCard files are generated without base64 encoding
Files are generated using valid text data
root_cause: The error occurs because the user attempted to convert plain text data to base64, which is not valid. This results in a corrupt file output that cannot be read properly by vCard-compatible applications.
fix_steps: Change the data conversion method to 'Convert to Text'
Ensure the correct value is set for the vCard content
agent_instruction: Switch the data conversion to 'Convert to Text' and set the correct value for the vCard.
